title: Bramia floribunda
taxonomy: Bramia floribunda is classified in the family Melanthiaceae. It belongs to the genus Bramia. The species is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. Bramia floribunda is further classified as a perennial herb. Its classification is closely related to other plants in the same family, such as the yellowjacket and the yellow flag.
